isolation.notes: Testing involves Nix commands; x86_64-linux builder unavailable, using derivation proof per validation contract

assertions.title: Flake source and package surfaces are fully renamed

steps.observed: packages.x86_64-linux.cogent is listed in flake outputs

steps.expected: Build succeeds or derivation is created
steps.observed: Derivation created successfully: 54fhq3y57v3sq8axp056ckv44hl7427p-cogent-0.1.0.drv (build failed due to missing x86_64-linux builder)

steps.action: Check derivation details with nix show-derivation
Verify package name with nix eval .#packages.x86_64-linux.cogent.pname
Search for stale references: rg 'github:yusefmosiah/cagent|cagent-src|cmd/cagent' flake.nix nix/
steps.observed: No matches found (exit code 0, no output)

evidence.notes: x86_64-linux builder unavailable; used derivation proof as equivalent temporary proof per validation contract

assertions.title: Built package exposes cogent and not cagent

steps.observed: No local cmd/ directory (source is from cogent-src flake input); package definition confirms cmd/cogent in upstream source
Go buildGoModule with cmd/cogent produces binary named cogent in $GOPATH/bin, installed to $out/bin/cogent
flake.nix:360-365 confirms cogent = pkgs.buildGoModule { pname = 'cogent'; subPackages = [ 'cmd/cogent' ]; }

evidence.notes: x86_64-linux builder unavailable; derivation proof demonstrates bin/cogent will be produced. Exact attrpath build deferred to post-push/GitHub verification per validation contract

assertions.title: VM package definitions include cogent and exclude stripped adapters

steps.action: Search for stale adapter references in nix/
steps.observed: rg found no matches for cagentPackage or codex in nix/ directory
nix/ch/sandbox-vm.nix uses cogentPackage parameter in 3 locations

steps.action: Verify flake passes cogentPackage to VMs
Evaluate VM package set for choiros-ch-sandbox-live
steps.observed: VM package list includes 'cogent', no cagent/codex/opencode found

steps.action: Evaluate VM package set for choiros-worker-ch-blk
steps.observed: VM package list includes 'cogent', no cagent/codex/opencode found

evidence.notes: Tested two representative VM configurations to confirm cogent package inclusion and adapter exclusion

assertions.title: Runtime CLI name matches Nix package and installed VM surface

steps.action: Search Rust runtime code for CLI command references
steps.expected: Runtime uses 'cogent' as CLI command name
steps.observed: sandbox/src/self_directed_dispatch.rs defines const COGENT_COMMAND: &str = 'cogent' and uses it in Command::new(COGENT_COMMAND)

steps.action: Verify no stale 'cagent' references in Rust code
steps.observed: rg found no 'cagent' references in Rust code

steps.action: Confirm Nix package name from flake show

steps.observed: Both choiros-ch-sandbox-live and choiros-worker-ch-blk include 'cogent' package

steps.expected: All surfaces (Rust runtime, Nix package, VM packages) use 'cogent'
steps.observed: Runtime expects 'cogent' CLI, Nix builds 'cogent' package with bin/cogent, VMs install 'cogent' package - all surfaces consistent

evidence.notes: Cross-cutting assertion confirmed by combining evidence from runtime code, package definition, and VM configurations

summary: Tested 4 assertions: all passed. Nix packaging surfaces successfully renamed from cagent to cogent. Flake exposes packages.x86_64-linux.cogent with correct pname and subPackages. VM configurations include cogent package and exclude deprecated adapters (codex, opencode-era). Runtime Rust code consistently uses 'cogent' as CLI command name. x86_64-linux build used derivation proof due to unavailable builder; exact attrpath build deferred to post-push/GitHub verification per validation contract guidance.
